title: Sweet Flavorist II
description:
Job Description:

We are looking for an experienced Sweet Flavorist to join our innovative R&D center in Singapore. The successful candidate will be responsible for developing and optimizing sweet flavor formulations to support our food and beverage product lines. You will work closely with cross-functional teams, including R&D, marketing, and quality management, to ensure innovation and high-quality products.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Sweet Flavor Development: Design and create new sweet flavor formulations based on market trends and consumer preferences, ensuring flavor harmony, stability, and applicability.
  • Formula Optimization: Analyze and improve existing sweet flavor formulations to enhance flavor performance and cost efficiency while complying with relevant regulations and quality standards.
  • Market Research: Participate in market research to identify new trends and innovation opportunities in sweet flavors to drive new product development.
  • Team Collaboration: Work closely with R&D, production, and marketing teams to ensure a smooth transition from concept to market launch.
  • Laboratory Management: Maintain laboratory equipment and environment, ensuring safety and operational efficiency while adhering to all procedures and safety protocols.
  • Consumer Testing: Engage in consumer testing and evaluation, making necessary adjustments based on feedback to meet market demands.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree or higher in Food Science, Biochemistry, or a related field.
  • Minimum of 5 years of experience in the sweet flavor industry or a related field.
  • Strong knowledge of sweet flavor ingredients, flavor chemistry, and food industry standards.
  • Expertise in sugars, sweeteners, and their interactions in different applications.
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment.
  • Strong communication and teamwork skills, able to collaborate with team members from diverse backgrounds.
  • Proficiency in relevant software and tools, with data analysis skills being a plus.

postedCompany.description:
Huabao Flavours & Fragrances Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and has been successfully listed on the Shenzhen Stock Exchange. Huabao is principally engaged in the research & development, production, sales and services of tobacco flavours, food flavours, daily chemical flavours and food ingredients; with a total of 39 subordinate companies globally. From 2014 - 2020, Huabao is ranked as No. 1 in Flavour & Fragrance industry in China. 

Wih the vision of "Flavour Your Life", the company insists on the enterprise spirits of "Innovation, Pragmatism, Loyalty and Cooperation", and the integrates domestic and foreign scientific research resources with international vision, to provide products style system solution and comprehensive technical services for customers.
postedCompany.name: HUABAO ASIA PACIFIC PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
